CAT Kenya Launches Digital Wellness Platform

New online platform provides confidential psychosocial support for survivors of online gender-based violence.

Legal Aid

Legal Aid Clinic Expands to 5 New Counties

Our mobile legal aid services now reach survivors in remote areas across Kenya.
